rationale.fidelity: Preserves the common ex ante friction choice, private user types, strategic participation, and platform payoff net of malicious harm.
rationale.managerial_framing: Provides a concrete actor, trigger, alternative common levels, strategic mechanism, deterrence-participation trade-off, and operational boundaries.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly contribution is requested or asserted.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels heterogeneous response as assumed and rejects observed types, personalized type-contingent policy, universal safety gains, and welfare equivalence.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear and technically careful, but repetitive and overlong.
rationale.overall: Fully faithful strategic-participation framing with no hard failure.
